_comment: Frozen baseline for check-design-tokens.mjs. Counts are total raw color literals across app/ and lib/ (excluding tests, generated code, SVG illustration files). hex includes #fff/#000 (kept-raw per docs/design-tokens.md), brand mark color, and SVG fills. rgba includes white-overlay glass effects with varying alphas, dark surface scrims, and one-off effect colors. The check fails if either count grows above this baseline. If you intentionally add a raw color, update this baseline in the same commit and explain why in the commit message.
